title: gaultheria × intermedia
intro: Gaultheria × intermedia, also known as Gaultheria hybrid or hybrid Gaultheria, is a hybrid plant resulting from the cross between Gaultheria procumbens and Gaultheria shallon. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in its ability to stimulate the release of saliva and mucus, making it a natural expectorant. The health benefits of Gaultheria × intermedia include its potential to aid in the relief of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, as well as its anti-inflammatory properties. Gaultheria × intermedia can be prepared as an herbal tea, infused oil, or tincture, allowing for various uses in traditional herbal remedies.
